package rulecoverage

func PositiveSqlNullTypesEscapeRepositoryBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "sql_null_types_escape_repository_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repository methods that leak driver-specific null wrappers beyond the persistence boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
